It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and inflammation, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Bobea elliptica include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and inflammation.
